inventoryTransfer.title: Inventory Transfer
inventoryTransfer.subtitle: Move products between storage locations and keep key shelves automatically replenished.
inventoryTransfer.invalidQuantity: Enter a valid quantity for each selected product.

automation.title: Active Reorder Rules
automation.subtitle: Monitor destination stock and move replenishment stock automatically when it drops below target.
automation.emptyDescription: Create a rule to replenish a destination storage automatically whenever it falls below your threshold.
automation.insightDescription: Reorder rules are checked after local inventory movements so your destination storage can refill the moment it drops below target.
automation.dialogDescription: Choose the product, replenishment path, threshold, and optional end date for this automatic transfer rule.
automation.selectSourceFirst: Select a source storage first to view its products.
automation.noProductsInSource: No products are currently available in this storage.
automation.defaultExpiryHint: Defaults to the end of the current year unless you mark the rule as indefinite.
automation.modalInsightDescription: Rules watch the destination storage. If it falls under the minimum level, the configured quantity is moved from the source storage automatically.
automation.triggerPreview: If stock in {{storage}} drops below {{min}}, move {{qty}} units.
automation.triggerPreviewFallback: Select a product and storages to preview the rule behavior.
automation.ruleCreatedDescription: Automatic reorder rule is now active.
automation.ruleDeletedDescription: The reorder rule has been removed.

transactions.title: Inventory Transactions
transactions.subtitle: Every manual transfer and automation move is recorded here. These records are permanent and cannot be deleted.
transactions.emptyDescription: Transfer products manually or let an automation rule trigger, and the records will appear here.
transactions.summaryDescription: A live count of permanent inventory transfer records for this workspace.
transactions.permanentDescription: Inventory transaction records are append-only. You can review them here, but they are intentionally not editable or deletable.
